The '''Mission to Gibbela''' was an embarrassing loss for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Gibbela]] was a remote world, left mostly alone by the wider galaxy. When an entire Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] squad landed on the planet, they discovered why. The [[Dazouri|native species]], appearing rather small, furry and harmless, were in fact, shapeshifters that could transform into a clawed ferocious form. The single native that the squad encountered destroyed the entire squad, then returned to his gardening.

==Appearances==
